# Fiable Building Solutions

> Expert waterproofing, structural rehabilitation, industrial flooring & grouting services for residential, commercial, and industrial projects across Lucknow, Delhi NCR & India.

## Contact Information
- Website: https://fiableprojects.com
- Main Address: 728/21, Gudamba BKT, Kursi Road, Gudamba, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh 226021, India
- Phone: +91-8069648411, +91-9044072226
- Email: sales@fiablebuildingsolutions.com, admin@fiableprojects.com
- Whatsapp: +91-8069648411

## Core Services

### [Waterproofing Services](https://fiableprojects.com/services/waterproofing-services)
Professional waterproofing systems for:
- Terraces and Roofs (PU membrane, acrylic coating, crack bridging)
- Basements (crystalline slurry, APP membrane, injection grouting)
- Bathroom and wet area sealing (sunken slabs, pipe joints)
- Exterior and interior wall dampness/seepage treatment (DPC injection, breathable finishes)

### [Structural Rehabilitation](https://fiableprojects.com/services/structural-rehabilitation)
RCC repairs and building strengthening solutions:
- Carbon Fiber Wrapping (polymer-strengthened reinforcement)
- Micro-concreting and jacketing of columns/beams
- Epoxy and PU pressure injection for crack sealing
- Corrosion treatment and structural auditing

### [Concrete Cutting & Demolition](https://fiableprojects.com/services/concrete-cutting-demolition)
Precision structural alteration and controlled demolition:
- Diamond core drilling
- Wire sawing and wall sawing for clean openings
- Zero-vibration demolition for occupied buildings

### [Industrial Flooring Systems](https://fiableprojects.com/services/industrial-flooring-systems)
High-performance flooring for industrial assets:
- Epoxy flooring (anti-static, high gloss, chemical resistant)
- Polyurethane (PU) flooring for food, pharma, and warehouses
- Heavy-duty concrete floor screeds and self-levelling underlayments

### [Industrial Grouting Services](https://fiableprojects.com/services/industrial-grouting-services)
High-strength precision grouting:
- Machine foundation grouting (non-shrink cementitious & epoxy grouts)
- Base plate and anchor bolt grouting
- Structural joint and gap filling

## Regional Coverage
- Primary Region: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India
- Key Lucknow Localities: Sitapur Road, Gomti Nagar, Aliganj, Hazratganj, Indiranagar, Kursi Road
- Regional Expansion: Kanpur, Noida, Delhi NCR, Pune

## Editorial & E-E-A-T
All content and guides published by Fiable are reviewed by civil engineers and senior applicators.
